title: bridge-jmap apiUrl SSRF: server-returned URL used without https:// validation
description: In jmap.rs init_session(), the apiUrl from the JMAP session response is stored and used for all subsequent API calls without validating that it starts with https://. A compromised or MITM'd JMAP server can redirect calls to http:// or to internal network addresses (169.254.x.x, 10.x.x.x, etc.), causing the bridge to forward the bearer token to an attacker-controlled endpoint. Trigger: attacker controls the JMAP session endpoint response.
